descFull: A practical AI agents handbook covering agent systems, agentic workflows, LangGraph, MCP/A2A, context engineering, agent memory, evaluation, observability, and multi-agent architecture. Current trend focus: agentic resource discovery, emerging agent runtimes, and production AI workflow patterns.
